text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I bump into Air Shakur while walking through the
shopping district one evening.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
What's with that face? Is the idea of me buying
food really so weird to you?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I just ran outta the ramune candy I use to
supplement my glucose levels. I've been running
out strangely quick, recently...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Come to think of it, it can't be a good sign that
my brain is demanding excess glucose. I've gotta
be careful.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's possible that Air Shakur is still fatigued from
her recent races. It looks like I should probably
rethink her upcoming race schedule.
